Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The OpenLogFile method opens the file that will receive log output.

Section.Title: Usage

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The UTF-8 path of the file to open for log output.
The native wide-character path of the file to open for log output.
The path of the file to open for log output, when the C++17 overload is available.
Pass true to append to existing file content, or false to truncate it.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: true if the file was opened successfully; otherwise false.
